title: Goniopteris leucophlebia

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever and skin infections. Goniopteris leucophlebia is also placed within the genus Goniopteris, which contains several species of ferns found in tropical and subtropical regions.
